steps.title: Use the parallel adjectives
steps.content: The word beckoning appears with seductive and charming. Those adjectives describe cities as attractive, so the underlined word should also suggest appeal or attraction.

steps.title: Reject unrelated meanings
steps.content: A means requiring effort, B means sending a signal without necessarily being appealing, and D means changing position or condition. The context needs a word for drawing someone toward something. The answer is C.
